title: Pottadhu Paththala Lyrics Saguni
stanzas:
Pottadhu paththala mappula
innoru quateru sollundi
appadiye matter keludaa

kannula rummu jinnu
ooththina aththa ponnu
bodhaiya yethikinnu
aada porenda..

Pottadhu paththala mappula
innoru quateru sollundi
appadiye matter keludaa

venaam macha soru
nee sollu rendu beeru
ada kuppathotti kooda
namakku panju methadaa

ye kudikaaran pechu
adhu vidunjiputta pochu
ada senja thappa
marandhu pogum
dheivam naangadaa

kavalai ellaam veratta
nee manasu vittu pesu
ne pesalana pottathellaam
lossu thaanadaa.

ada vaanam boomi sirusu
indha baru thaanda perusu
idhu kudika porandha
manushanukku sorgam thaanada

oru pegu
adida rendu pegu
adichu yaethikittu
apathaa neeyum kinguda

Pottadhu paththala mappula
innoru quateru sollundi
appadiye matter kelud

enakkunuthaan porandhaa
ava yenda enna marandhaa
ye ninjil koodu kattiputtu
parandhuputta daa

thandhen indha madiya
ava vachcha adhil vediya
naan thoolu thoolaa
sukkunooraa sedhariputtenda

ada thallaaduthu kaalu
enna thaangikolla yaaru
naan polamburatha ketka
oru koottam venumdaa

ye eththanayo sogam
adha enna kooru podum
ada ennennamo nenaikuren
vaartha valladaa

Pottadhu paththala mappula
innoru quateru sollundi
appadiye matter keludaa

kannula rummu jinnu
ooththina aththa ponnu
bodhaiya yethikinnu
aada porenda..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Pottadhu Paththala conveys a lively and carefree attitude, celebrating fun and enjoyment.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Saguni, the song is featured during a festive scene, highlighting the characters' joyous moments.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Anthonydasan and composed by GV PrakashKumar.

When was the song released?

Pottadhu Paththala was released on June 22, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Pottadhu Paththala from Saguni is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, perfectly encapsulating the carefree spirit of youth. It showcases the protagonist's exuberance and zest for life, making it a fitting anthem for parties and celebrations. The energetic beats and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, inviting listeners to dance along. Overall, the song conveys a message of enjoying life's moments to the fullest.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pottadhu Paththala from the movie Saguni is an electrifying track that captures the essence of celebration and joy. With Anthonydasan's vibrant vocals and GV PrakashKumar's catchy composition, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the infectious energy that makes this song a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: The thing that happened, tell me about it, just like that, listen to the matter.
The girl who has a sparkle in her eyes, what is she thinking, she will dance now.
Do you want to break the house, everyone is just joking with me.
The thing that happened, tell me about it, just like that, listen to the matter.
No need, buddy, you say the food, even if we have to struggle, we will manage somehow.
The talk of the drinker has gone away, whatever was done is forgotten, God is with us.
Don't worry, just speak your mind, if you don't, everything will be a loss.
Oh, the sky and earth, this small thing is big, for a person born to drink, this is heaven.
One punch, two punches, hitting and asking, you too are a king.
The thing that happened, tell me about it, just like that, listen to the matter.
I was born for this, what did she forget, she flew away with a thought in her mind.
I gave this place, and in it, I am the one who is happy, is it really so?
Oh, who can bear my legs, to hear my complaints, I need a crowd.
How much sorrow is there, what can I say, I think about it, words are not enough.
The thing that happened, tell me about it, just like that, listen to the matter.
The girl who has a sparkle in her eyes, what is she thinking, she will dance now.
Do you want to break the house, everyone is just joking with me.
